programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Coachella Valley Scorpions face off against the Denver Iconics in a men's NPL team match.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate National Championship
programme.desc: The stage is set at the Collegiate National Championships for a high-stakes final showdown between the defending champions, the University of North Carolina Tar Heels, and the powerhouse University of Virginia Cavaliers. In an electric atmosphere fueled by a raucous Virginia crowd, the "third man" in the stands, both teams battle for the ultimate prize: the national championship trophy. Watch as top-tier athletes like former soccer player Caitlin Lewis and lefty specialist Lorelai lead their teams through a technical "reset clinic," showcasing elite defensive rallies that would impress the pros. With Sarah Carpenter adding her multi-sport prowess to the mix, this four-game match delivers high-velocity firefights, strategic timeouts, and momentum shifts that define the pinnacle of collegiate pickleball.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The road to the championship reaches a fever pitch at Mumbai's Jio World Garden for the second semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2. In this high-stakes "penultimate tie," the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans face off against a hungry Delhi Dilwale squad led by coach Wesley Gabrielsson. Witness a clash of styles as the dominant Katerina Stewart, who has lost only one match all season, battles the passionate Alejandra Lopez in a critical women's singles opener. Tactical brilliance is on full display as Max Mantor and Trang Huynh attempt to dismantle the Jawans' defense in a high-scoring mixed doubles "exhibition". With every strategic "Pickle Play" and intense baseline rally potentially deciding who advances to the grand finale, the atmosphere is electric and the margins for error are razor-thin.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Welcome to Week 1, Day 1 of the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, live from The Pickler in Noblesville. This crucial Collegiate Team Match features the University of Wisconsin Madison battling a developing Purdue University squad. This match is pool play for seeding, with teams competing for one of eight bids to the National Championship and a share of the $5,000 prize money.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: Tuesday Night Pickleball heats up as the Surprise Stingers go head-to-head with the Scottsdale Scorchers at The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health. Expect fiery team chemistry, quick-paced exchanges, and a crowd-ready atmosphere in this Arizona Pickleball League showdown.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: In this alternate cut of the Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournament’s most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this fierce "Commonwealth Clash" features Virginia Tech taking on their in-state rivals, the University of Virginia (UVA). This pivotal pool play match is part of the fourth regional of the season, with teams vying for crucial seeding and a bid to the National Championship.The episode showcases intense action, starting with Women's Doubles, where UVA's Armelle Worrell and Mia Kim face off against Virginia Tech's Amelia Gaze and Heather Murphy. Later, watch the high-stakes Men's Singles match between Virginia Tech's Cody Miller, known for his reach and strategic placement, and UVA's Braden Cizek, who fights to keep his team in the series. With Virginia Tech leading 3-1 entering the singles match, every point counts.

programme.title: Pickleball England
programme.desc: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Watch a masterclass in senior pro pickleball as Peter Prodanov and Scott Moore take on Scott Crandall and Jose Derisi. With explosive hands, strategic play, and experience driving every point, this US Open quarterfinal is a showcase of skill, grit, and high-level doubles tactics.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: The atmosphere at the Arch Pickleball Center in Saint Louis reaches a fever pitch as the Utah Tech Trailblazers face off against the FAU Owls in a high-stakes semifinal showdown. This match showcases a "racing" intensity as Liam Duffin looks to maintain Utah Tech's momentum following their grueling victory over Colorado. Fans are treated to the technical "skills" and "freestyle" shot-making of Alex LaMacchia, whose crafty drop shots and highlight-reel volleys keep the score neck and neck throughout the opening game. With a spot in the National Championship on the line, both squads must navigate high-pressure video challenges and tactical timeouts in a match many spectators believe is worthy of the final itself.

The intensity is at an all-time high after Florida's grueling "dream breaker" victory over NC State to reach this stage. Elite talent takes center stage, featuring former D1 tennis stars like Laura Font and Norwegian standout Martinez Sunstein facing off against Virginia’s deep roster of defending champions. From powerful serves to tactical kitchen play, every point counts in this high-stakes quest for a championship bid.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)

Experience high-stakes professional pickleball where every point counts for the WPBL semi-finals.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate National Championship
programme.desc: The defending national champions, the Utah Tech Trailblazers, face their toughest test yet against a relentless Florida Gators squad in a high-stakes quarterfinal clash. With elite firepower meeting gritty veteran experience, every point is a battle for survival on the road to the Final Four. The intensity reaches a fever pitch as these two powerhouses push the limits of collegiate pickleball in a match that demands nothing less than perfection.

programme.desc: The Indianapolis Drivers take on the Princeton Bruisers in a women's match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2022
programme.desc: Championship Court hosts a star-studded final as brothers Ben and Collin Johns take on Matt Wright and Riley Newman in this Men’s Pro Doubles finale. Packed with elite strategy, blistering hand battles, and dramatic swings, this is top-tier pickleball at its most intense.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a critical Day 4 clash between the Rajasthan Titans and the league-leading Chennai Super Champs. Entering the tie as heavy favorites, coach Johnny Goldberg’s Chennai squad looks to solidify their top spot on the leaderboard. Meanwhile, the Rajasthan Titans, led by coach Leigh Whitwell, are desperate to find their rhythm and climb the points table after a challenging start to the season.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: The NCPA Nationals reach a fever pitch in Saint Louis as the University of Arizona Wildcats and the CU Boulder Buffaloes go head-to-head in a high-stakes, best-of-seven showdown. This elite showcase features "smash mouth" pickleball, where powerhouses like Eileen Tran and Frida Madsen utilize aggressive "Skills" to dominate the kitchen line. The intensity explodes during the "Racing" pace of sudden-death points, forcing competitors into a tactical "Freestyle" battle of wills as they navigate a tight center court with no room for error. With the series tied and mixed doubles on the horizon, every serve carries the weight of a national title.

They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.

programme.title: Pickleball England

This match features dynamic teams: Megan Fudge and Susannah Barr face off against Lee Whitwell and Riley Bohnert in a highly competitive final. Follow expert commentary highlighting key plays including Susannah Barr’s precise lobs, Megan Fudge’s powerful forehand, and strategic teamwork. See how the match unfolds in a best-of-three games format with a hard stop on time. This showcase of top-level English pickleball captures the skill, tactics, and intensity of the sport. Stay tuned for post-match insights and upcoming mixed doubles action.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)

From early leads and tactical shot-making to late-game drama and camaraderie, watch Hunter and Yates battle it out point by point in a historic and captivating final. Featuring expert commentary and insights into their playing styles, this match is a must-watch for pickleball fans everywhere.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat B features six contestants, all battling for a spot in the series finals. To make it through, they must prove their mettle in the Gauntlet, Trial (British Bulldog) and battle it out in the Arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six more contestants enter the arena. This week the arena transforms into a Robot football pitch and Sergeant Bash meets his match. Which contestant will score a place in the finals?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Lightweight special; the six contestants this week make up for what they lack in size, with agility. Can they weave their way through the house robots in the gauntlet? Or will they knock each other off-course in this week’s trial, stock car racing?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six contestants enter the arena, but how many will leave? As the robots navigate their way through this week’s trial, the Labyrinth, who knows what lies around each corner? Victory or elimination?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: No cues necessary as six new contestants play robot snooker in this week’s trial. The victors of this heat will be joining the other winners in the Grand Final. Who will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The First Wars?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight of the heat winners gather for the first Semi-Finals. With two rounds to prove themselves, only two robots will make it to the Grand Finals. Competitors show no mercy as they use any means necessary to eliminate their opponents.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor’s weapon proves fatal for their opposition, crushing their hopes of a title with a single blow, whilst other unlucky robots are removed from not only the arena, but also the competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Grand Final is here as the series draws to an explosive end. With every battle being so well matched, the judges have their work cut out for them as they decide which robot, will become Robot Wars: The Seventh Wars champions.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Twelve Robots from across the globe once again gather in the arena for the Third World Championship. Eliminator style rounds will decide which robots progress through to the finals, where a winner will be crowned.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots enter arena and will not stop battling until only one remains in this annihilator main event. The House Robot Rebellion pitted two competitors against Mr. Psycho, Growler and Cassius Chrome.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the second Revival Series begins. Robots return from previous series to take on the daring newcomers and each other. Competitors get bullied and thrown around the ring as they desperately try to scrape a place in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A tentative start to the second heat ends in carnage as the house robots and competitors go all out to qualify. Shunt delivers the final blow for one contestant.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The third heat shows devastating weapons put into action, being on the receiving end of these could mean elimination for an unlucky competitor. The house robots take on cleaning duties as they remove immobilised robots from the arena floor.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor draws first blood only seconds into the first round. After suffering severe damage at the hands of another competitor, one robots chance at the finals may be lost.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The last chance for combatants to fight for a place in the Grand Final. With the newcomers outnumbering the veterans, will the first timers make up for their lack of experience?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This episode, a new Robot Wars champion will emerge! Sparks and scraps are sure to fly in this explosive series finale. Winners will have to make it through the four-way melees and head-to-head battles to be able to prove themselves in the final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Follow Team Chaos's journey. From humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Newcomers, veterans and a recent President enter the fray in this first Heat of the series. Competitors are eliminated left, right and centre and only the strongest will survive to compete in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A veteran only heat features the current reigning Champions, Carbide. Will Carbide’s streak be brought to an end by the other robots, more experienced and eager than ever?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Even the judges aren’t safe as two robots collide, sending shrapnel through the bullet-resistant shields around the arena. Two very different styles of robot meet in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer stares down seven veterans, will their induction into the arena be successful, or will their inexperience find them in the pit? One robot will have a second chance to qualify in the Redemption Round.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Using competitors own video diaries, exclusive action from the pits and the best of the battles, Philippa Forrester will get down to the nuts and bolts of Robot Wars, The Second Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Philippa goes behind the scenes to find out how the shows fighting machines are made, whilst uncovering the trials and tribulations of their frantic creators.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of Robot Wars Series 2, more exclusive footage and access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of this week’s competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Witness hope, triumph, desperation and defeat as Philippa takes us back to the pits, where competitors make final touches to their Robots, hoping they come back in one piece.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of how the production team setup the arena for contests such as jousting and pinball. Gain an insight as to how competitors construct their robots from team video diaries.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More behind the scenes of the hit series Robot Wars. Philippa gets into the nitty gritty of why competitors choose to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of Robot Wars, see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: See what happens when little kids become big kids, and toy trains are replaced by chainsaws. Watch the teams as they lock themselves in their workshops, creating killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Delving behind the trenches of Robot Wars, digging for dirt in the competitors own video diaries.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A unique, undercover look at Robot Wars Series 2. Featuring exclusive footage from the teams and highlights from the battles.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Newcomers, veterans and a recent President enter the fray in this first Heat of the series. Competitors are eliminated left, right and centre and only the strongest will survive to compete in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A veteran only heat features the current reigning Champions, Carbide. Will Carbide’s streak be brought to an end by the other robots, more experienced and eager than ever?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Even the judges aren’t safe as two robots collide, sending shrapnel through the bullet-resistant shields around the arena. Two very different styles of robot meet in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer stares down seven veterans, will their induction into the arena be successful, or will their inexperience find them in the pit? One robot will have a second chance to qualify in the Redemption Round.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The final heat features only veterans, here for an opportunity to make up for their mistakes in the previous tournaments. Only one competitor will make it into the Grand Finals, and the others must suffer defeat, again.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: After lengthy repairs and inspirational pep talks, the qualifiers prepare to fight for the title. A 10-way Robot Rumble will give the victor a spot in the Grand Finals, alongside the heat winners.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots come to the arena to try and best the challenges that await, including Skittles, where they must act as an autonomous bowling ball to knock over as many barrels as they can, whilst trying to avoid the house robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Competitors have a chance to go head-to-head with a house robot in a test of strength and strategy in this week’s trial, tug of war. Winners progress to the next round, losers take a face first dive into the pit.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This week’s trial takes the competitors back in time to medieval England, where they will joust against an unyielding house robot in hopes of winning a chance at the crown. The house robots team up to take down an unlucky competitor in the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Football returns to the arena in this week’s trial, complete with ferocious tackles, flamethrowers and own goals. In the semi-final, three of the house robots turn the arena into a barbeque.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Competitors need to hold their own in King of the Castle, where they must defend a circle in the arena against the unforgiving house robots. How many will survive to make it to the semi-finals? A winner is decided by the pit in this week’s final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: House robot, Shunt goes head-to-head with the competitors. It’s his job to remove the competitors from the ring by any means necessary in this week’s trial, Sumo. Will Shunt do the house robots proud, or will the competitors give him the slip?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The gauntlet has a menacing addition, The Sentinel. Will the new robot prove to be a real obstacle, or an easy route to be exploited? The Skittles trial returns to the arena, but one competitor wants to take down more than just barrels.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Football returns this week in the trial. New competitors enter the arena with high hopes of securing a place in the finals. The house robots show no mercy in the Gauntlet.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Matilda’s tusks get put to good use against the competitors as jousting returns to the arena. Two competitors form a rivalry after a memorable battle in the semi-finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Matilda takes centre stage again, as she attempts to pull as many competitors into the pit as possible in another tug of war. How will the competitors fair against the hazards of the arena and the merciless house robots?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Competitors are once again tasked with defending their land in King of the Castle, will they defend their reign or be overthrown by the house robots? An even match in the semi-finals causes the house robots to forcefully decide a winner.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Dead Metal takes to the ring to stop any competitors from progressing to the stage of the competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: First of the two Semi-Finals to determine which two of the six heat winners will progress to The Second Wars Grand Finals. The house robots are showing no mercy in the gauntlet and the competitors test their accuracy in this week’s trial, Pinball.

programme.title: Fabric to Fashion
programme.desc: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!

programme.title: Great British Baking
programme.desc: Baking has been practised for thousands of years. As well as being a domestic practise it is now a huge commercial industry with celebrity chefs and programmes dedicated to baking! Learn the most basic step by step bread and cake recipes and then move on to more advance techiniques to make delicious cakes, plus biscuits and desserts. Recipes featured include Cinnamon Rolls, Lemon Cream Cheesecake, Pailted Poppy Seed Loaf, Caramel Slices, Bakewell Tart and Sticky Ginger Cake

programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, a Chinese woman trains in the covert arts. When she arrives in Hong Kong, she learns that her brother works on behalf the Japanese cause. She then pulls together a team of women warriors to stop her brother

programme.title: Dark Space
programme.desc: When their shuttle is damaged on the way to Centari Five, six friends are forced to crash land on the surface of a mysterious alien planet. Stranded with little hope of rescue, it soon becomes clear that they are not alone. Hunted by the planet's ferociou

programme.title: The Avenging Eagle
programme.desc: Eagle Chief Yoh Xi-hung raises orphans to be his personal killers. One such is Chik Ming-sing who now wants to put his killer life behind him. When the Eagle Clan come after him, a stranger called Cheuk comes to his assistance It turns out that Cheuk is the son of a family who were robbed and murdered by the Eagles. Now they will team up to destroy the evil clan.

programme.title: Charlie Moore: No Offense
programme.desc: Fishing enthusiast Charlie Moore, also known as "The Mad Fisherman," is stepping out of his comfort zone and into the worlds of his guests, but first they have to visit his. programme.title: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: The first episode of Fresh Quilting's new season features blocks - the most basic of quilt techniques. Ebony Love show how to use negative space in nontraditional blocks. Then, Lee Chappell Monroe demonstrates basic techniques for attaching blocks together. Eliane Bergmann will close each episode with a sewing machine tip to elevate your quilting. Her tip for this episode is quilt as you go and how to create panels with scraps and turn them into coasters, pouches and more.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Don't you love that feeling when you use up every bit of fabric for a quilt? Tune in as Angela blazes the path to a stash-neutral quilt that leaves no scrap behind.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela is kicking off Season 7 of the Midnight Quilt Show with a redemption story. She’s made this Thistle quilt pattern before with half-square triangles but thinks this flying-geese version will be much easier to quilt.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Inspiration for today's fashion comes from many sources, including the glamour of the silver screen. Angela Wolf starts out with a luxurious chemise top; perfect under a jacket or sweater or glamorous all by itself for evening wear. Then it's time to bring out your inner princess as Cheryl Sleboda creates crowns - fit for a movie star, your favorite cosplay outfit, or a little girl's party.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Using parachute cord in a whole new way, author Ashley Bunting adds beads from her stash to make a charming, colorful floral brooch. Katie rides the floral jewelry wave with pendants made with leather flowers, wire and crystals.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Save special treasures in pockets. Julie Fei-Fan Balzer brushes up page pockets with patterns. May Flaum mixes pockets into traditional pages. Joe Rotella has a stamping tip and Christine Drumheller goes way outside the pockets with embellishments.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: This season is all about inspiration, particularly from the art masters. We're not only inspired but we take that creativity one step further with new materials. We begin with a design that pays homage to Sigmar Polke, a contemporary artist that was known for using varied materials even glass. We make a stitched canvas. Then Joe Rotella is back, taking a page from Sigmar's book by using found objects like wood and license plates to make a modern birdhouse. We'll finish up with May Flaum and the post-impressionist era and a lesson on being inspired by art but styling it in your own way.

programme.title: Working with Difficult Fabric
programme.desc: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine a rainbow quilt, a star quilt and a medallion quilt all into one? A fresh episode of "The Midnight Quilt Show," of course! Join Angela as she breaks down Y-seams, quilting with templates and beyond.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Looking for a fun beginner-friendly quilt? Angela’s got you covered with a super simple pattern that leaves plenty of room for the quilting — easy cutting, easy piecing, easy peasy!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: In this season finale, Angela does a little flower arranging (quilter's style!) to create Monique Jacobs' beautiful Bouquet quilt.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela whips up a stash-busting table topper using the quilt-as-you-go method Gudrun Erla teaches in her online class "Fast & Furious: Quilt-As-You-Go With Pre-Cuts."

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: Creative Cake Design presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Welcome to CraftsyTV's Cook & Create, where delectable delights meet crafty creators.

programme.title: Artist's Academy presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Welcome to Artists's Academy where we are dedicated to making you a better artist. We believe everyone has an artist within, waiting to be unleashed. Our mission is to be your ultimate resource for visual art education using tutorials covering everything from fundamental techniques to advanced concepts in painting and drawing.

programme.title: Cast On/Bind Off
programme.desc: Learn to knit, step-by-step with The Knitting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: George Vondriska is in the shop to show you how to make your own hand-turned bottle stoppers and pizza cutters. Whether they're a gift for a loved one or just something to show off in your own kitchen, these pieces are easier to make than you might think. He'll also show you how to make your own saw horses and stools to give you more real estate in the shop.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: On this show, piecework like you've never seen it before -- as traditional quilting meets fashion. Think a little outside of the box as Angela Wolf makes a color block dress that's really just a variation on a large patchwork design. Then, quilter Jeni Baker demonstrates piecework on a smaller scale with a half square quilt perfect for beginners.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Hold onto your needles! Tracie and Jodi, are here to dish out fresh fiber inspiration. From project picks to wooly good gossip, things are about to get super knitty… and maybe just a little nutty.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: As if you needed more reasons to knit... The Grocery Girls are back with the 11 reasons you should be knitting every day, and some of them might surprise you!

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: What's the nicest style of knitting? Canadian, of course! Join Tracie and Jodi for a lesson in knitting styles, and find out what it takes to knit like a Canadian!

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: The ladies are going big by thinking small! From compact cables to cute mini skeins, this one's all about the tiny treasures that keep those needles clicking.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: People keep life exciting. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs and a special friend show how to tag your best friends with matching lanyard tags. Candie Cooper celebrates diversity with whimsical cone kids. She also crafts one-of-a-kind wooden kokeshi dolls. Jenny uses age-old symbols to monoprint a family crest to frame or use for banners.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Today we take a very personal approach using our names and monograms. Our first projects are monogram ornaments made from air dry clay. Then make initial letter necklaces for you and your friends. Today's art journal technique is lettering -- learn some tips for simple calligraphy. Finally make an initial bulletin board covered with initials and doodle art.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Author and instructor Melissa Grakowsky-Shippee creates stunning beaded components using two-hole tile beads and teaches her technique for a flawless herringbone stitch. Katie discusses the various types of memory wire as she makes a glass bead bracelet that's fun to wear.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Author Laura Poplin combines the ancient art of leatherwork and chainmaille to make beautiful contemporary jewelry. Learn to make colorful dyed and painted leather rectangles and finish them into jewelry using classic leatherworking techniques. Laura shows how to connect leather pieces with Byzantine chainmaile weave to make a cuff style bracelet. Katie demonstrates a quick and easy cup chain bracelet.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Scrapbooking can get very regimented – with the right way to use a product or the correct way to lay out a page. Today we're encouraging a more casual approach – one that fits your life style and design aesthetics. Take a casual approach to your scrapbooking with two "hello" themed pages, scrapbook sketches from Kelly Purkey, and five ways to use lattice designs from Sara Naumann.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Not all artists use brushes, and paint is not their only medium of choice. On today's episode, we begin with a lesson inspired by Camille Pissarro as we paint using a palette knife instead of a brush. Then meet Dina Wakley for a graffiti inspired, modern street art design. We finish up with Cheryl Boglioli and a 3D sculpture using an interesting medium to create a female form reminiscent of modernism.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week the Midnight Quilter is busy assembling Easter baskets, and a quilt, of course. See Angela demonstrate how to do a mitered border, plus how to quilt using rulers!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This is not a drill! Angela has heard your requests loud and clear, and she's finally making the Bargello quilt that everyone's been asking for! So break out the layer cakes and prepare to get crazy with precuts.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Easy piecey! This week Angela's keepin' it fun and fresh with a mod triangles quilt that's simple to put together.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This practical and cute quilted zipper pouch is one of Angela's favorite projects yet, because it skips the piecing and gets straight to the quilting! In this episode, she shares three quilting designs every quilter should know: ribbon candy, serpentine lines and the paisley feather, while making a small, easy quilting project for beginners that only requires two fat quarters to make!

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.desc: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.desc: Learn to quilt step by step with National Quilting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: George Vondriska shows you how to create a handmade ring stand that's perfect for storing rings next to the sink, on a bedside table, or even in the workshop. programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.desc: Doubt and disbelief plague the Stormhunters after an exhaustive chase through Tornado Alley. The team is forced to make an uncomfortable decision. Do they play it safe or push past their fear?

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: The Stormhunters find themselves knee deep in flood waters as historic rainfall threatens to wash them away.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
